title: naomifridman/BreastDCEDL: BreastDCEDL v1.0
author: naomi fridman
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
First release of the BreastDCEDL dataset GitHub companion code. Includes preprocessing scripts, metadata parsers, and ViT model weights for pCR prediction. 
 Zenodo DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15627233
